Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defts To Serve Further Responses And Responses To Documents Production Requests For Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-06-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BRADLEY R. WHITE, TEL. NO. (510)219-5831 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - Notice was not given to the opposing party after the tentative ruling came out. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CHRISTINA SAGONOWSKY'S Motion To Compel Defendant To Serve Further Responses And Responses To Documents Production Requests For Production Of Documents is Denied. Moving party failed to meaningfully meet and confer prior to the filing of the instant motion. (CCP 2016.040; see also Volkswagenwerk Aktiengesellschaft v. Sup.Ct. (1981) 122 Cal.App.3d 326.) Monetary sanctions are awarded in favor of Mr. Kekoa and against Plaintiff's counsel personally in the amount of $ 750.00 to be paid within 30 days of this order. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/ln

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defts To Serve Further Responses And Responses To Documents Production Requests For Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-19-2013 Continued To Sep-06-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on MON-AUG-19-2013:
Bradley R. White, Esq. [510.219.5831] appearing for CHRISTINA SAGONOWSKY, plaintiff / moving party;
Alan L. Martini, Esq. of Sheuerman, Martini & Tabari [408.288.9700] appearing for CURTIS KEKOA, JR., defendant / opposing party

Defendant's counsel does not stipulate to have the judge pro tem hear this matter. The matter is argued. Plaintiff CHRISTINA SAGONOWSKY'S Motion to Compel Defendants to Serve Further Responses and Responses to Documents Production Requests for Production of Documents and for Monetary Sanctions is continued to September 6, 2013 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

RULING - A R G U E D; Defendant CURTIS KEKOA'S Motion to Compel Plaintiff Deposition and Request for Monetary Sanctions- Motion to compel is Granted, no opposition filed. Sanctions is denied.
